Package com.saperion.intf

Interface SaValue

public interface SaValue
A SaValue represents a single value contained in a field of a DDC for a specific document. Because DDCs can contain multivalue-fields, SaPropertyValue is used to represent both single- and multivalue fields.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    asString()
    Returns the string representation of this value.

    Compares the contents of compareValue with this object's contents.

    Returns the date value, if set.

    Returns the date value as array, if set.

    getFloatValue()
    Returns the float value, if set.

    boolean
    isNull()
